span.p: Browser Memory Daemon - WSL Media Worker - Components

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads and advances current
artifact/task state in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Runs one bounded recovery
batch before new fetch work
through

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Runs bounded current-state
cleanup before due-task
leasing through

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Runs one bounded due-task
batch through

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Commits tier transitions and
durable deletion intent in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads and removes
authoritative local outage
bytes from

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Streams and verifies
recovered destination bytes
in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Leases tasks and records
artifact outcomes in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
External web pages,
image/video URLs, and media
CDNs that Chrome loads or
that sidecars fetch as
page-related media.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Orders one bounded automatic
spool-recovery pass, bounded
current-state reconciliation,
and one bounded public-media
task pass; records
redaction-safe outcomes.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Checks guarded-root
readiness, streams and
hash-verifies destination
bytes, commits the SQLite
tier switch and deletion
intent, then removes the
local source.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Closes bounded stale stored
work and reconciles current
CDP/blob coverage through
in-process repository
functions before due-task
leasing.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Leases due daemon-public
tasks, runs guarded
direct/HLS fetch without
Chrome cookies, applies
process budgets, and records
terminal or retry state.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable text/metadata
authority including migration
ledger, capture observations,
and immutable observation
ingest sequences.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Bounded disposable
image/video/audio bytes under
the configured media root;
explicit external roots
require mount and
identity-marker proof before
access.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Opt-in durable outage buffer
beneath the local WSL data
root; admission counts
committed files and distinct
in-flight SQLite
reservations, and drain
verifies bytes before tier
transition/source cleanup.
